issues.description: Rest action missing required condition: 'up to 1' means optional targeting with max 1 character. Current DSL has no condition limiting selection.

Rest action missing secondary effect: 'that Character will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase' is a persistent effect that must be encoded. Current DSL does not prevent activation.
PowerBoost condition is 'Always' but should be 'HasRestingDon' or equivalent checking 'opponent has 2 or more rested Characters'. No condition validates the threshold.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text specifies 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase'. This requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' or a multi-turn effect, not single EndOfTurn.
